limitations: Automated line-by-line and relevant-context review does not constitute completed named-human or external human review.
Classification is a bounded technical record for the exact signed F tree and does not establish runtime product correctness.
Hosted workflow metadata and logs are retained byte-bound records, not cryptographic attestations issued by GitHub.

LIMITATION (CH-T002/E07): requirements_complete=true attests frozen CH-T002 technical and evidence requirements only: deterministic complete byte/line packet coverage of every regular Git blob on the exact signed snapshot; primary-lane assignment for every subject and distinct secondary-lane assignment for every critical subject; three independent signed automated technical review records plus signed automated lead-support review under distinct frozen keys. Human review coverage is NOT performed and NOT claimed: automated_review_only=true; independent_human_review_performed=false; named_human_review_performed=false; required_external_human_review_satisfied=null. No human, named-human, external, organizational, release, or publication review or approval is asserted or implied. Overall release status remains NO_GO; named/external human review is deferred to designated successor tasks.
No release, deployment, publication, tag, GitHub release, DOI, Zenodo record, or archive authority is granted.
Successful operation at hard resource ceilings is not claimed; limits are fail-closed validation bounds.
